R5 no tests -> 129 passing tests incl. read-only guard

gate_readiness.gocold_wms_flow: n/a (no root MODULES.md; validated by pytest 129 green + real-data runs)

verdict: Wave + dispatch tooling in this repo is built, committed, and 129-test green with CC read-only enforced. The only built-but-not-live path is dims->CC sync (dim-capture-app), blocked by an unauthenticated real-CC write (B1), an unrun /deploy-local (B2), and prod-gating security hardening (B3).
